Story quest chain

The Sacrifice

7 parts

Targets8
Rewards6

Chain Overview

StartWarp Gate
SystemSarkinon
Parts7
First questThe Sacrifice: Part 1

Travel / deliver to Amadun

Route & Targets

  • System: Sarkinon
  • Location: Amadun in Sarkinon
  • Location: Warp Gate in Sarkinon
  • Targets: Electro Blob lvl 29, Electro Blob lvl 26, Vicious Blade lvl 29, Vicious Blade lvl 12, Blood Macrophage lvl 26, Blood Macrophage lvl 31, Infested Fanatic Raider lvl 38, Infested Fanatic lvl 35

Part 1: The Sacrifice: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Amadun

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Warp Gate in Sarkinon.
  2. Travel to Amadun.
  3. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  4. Turn in the quest to unlock The Sacrifice: Part 2.

Description

The Helping Hand Foundation: “Examin the planet Amadun in Sarkinon and observe the neolitic tribe that has been discovered there. Be careful and don’t disturb their culture. Report back to us when you are ready.”

Completion

Priest: “A new bright star has appeared on the night sky and its calling for our devotion. Worship the god and we will recieve eternal blessing in our afterlife! Bless us all with his knowledge!”

Part 2: The Sacrifice: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission 1000 hearts

Defeat 150 Electro Blob lvl 29, Electro Blob lvl 26

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 150 Electro Blob lvl 29, Electro Blob lvl 26.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock The Sacrifice: Part 3.
  3. Some exact counts or destination names still come from placeholder text in the client cache, so the narrative text remains important.

Description

Kill [amount] Electro Blobs to impress the neolitic tribe on Amadun.

Completion

Priest: “Hail the new god! A sign appeared on the sky again and an army of blobs were slayed. May he be worshipped in eternity and prepare the fiest of a thousand souls!”

Part 3: The Sacrifice: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission 1000 hearts

Defeat 150 Vicious Blade lvl 29, Vicious Blade lvl 12

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 150 Vicious Blade lvl 29, Vicious Blade lvl 12.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock The Sacrifice: Part 4.
  3. Some exact counts or destination names still come from placeholder text in the client cache, so the narrative text remains important.

Description

Kill [amount] Viscous Blades to practise your omnipotence.

Completion

Priest: “Bless us all! The saviour has once more appeared on the sky and the spinning daemons were vanquished. Hail our saviour! Prepare a the fiest of a thousand virgins!”

Part 4: The Sacrifice: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission 100 hearts

Defeat 80 Blood Macrophage lvl 26, Blood Macrophage lvl 31

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 80 Blood Macrophage lvl 26, Blood Macrophage lvl 31.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock The Sacrifice: Part 5.
  3. Some exact counts or destination names still come from placeholder text in the client cache, so the narrative text remains important.

Description

Kill [amount] Blood Macrophages to convince the priest even more.

Completion

Priest: “Alas! The god is forgiving, he refuses more than a tenth of our usual sacrifice to show his kindness to the people. Prepare the small harvest of a hundred souls!”

Part 5: The Sacrifice: Part 5

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission 7 hearts

Defeat 25 Infested Fanatic Raider lvl 38, Infested Fanatic lvl 35

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 25 Infested Fanatic Raider lvl 38, Infested Fanatic lvl 35.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock The Sacrifice: Part 6.
  3. Some exact counts or destination names still come from placeholder text in the client cache, so the narrative text remains important.

Description

Destroy [amount] Infested Fanatics to impress the tribe even more.

Completion

Priest: “A miracle has happened! The god has bestowed great power in me, thus I will continue to watch over you, my beloved, but very few children. Hail me and let the fiest of seven sould begin!”

Part 6: The Sacrifice: Part 6

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 3xlvl75 artifacts

Travel / deliver to Amadun

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Amadun.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Sacrifice: Part 7.

Description

Visit the great priest and use your omnipotence to convince him to sacrifice his ancient tribal artifacts.

Completion

Crew: “I think we should keep this little episode to our self when we report back to the foundation. We have to explain why the population has been decimated to one!“

Part 7: The Sacrifice: Part 7

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 4000-4200 + 8 Flux

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.

Description

Head back to the warpgate in Sarkinon and give the Helping Hand Foundation a short explanation of the neolitic tribes internal conflicts and the horrific sacrifices made to a local diety.

Completion

The Helping Hand Foundation: “Err… a population of one? Sacrifices to a dragon? A thousand virgins entering the sky? I think we are better off with someone else in the future. Thank you for trying though.”

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
